enderpocket.config.title: Explorer's Ender Chest
enderpocket.config.requireUnlock.tooltip: Only show the button after you've opened a physical ender chest in this world. On dedicated servers the server's own setting is what counts.
enderpocket.config.rememberOpen.tooltip: Keep the panel open across inventory opens (per game session).
enderpocket.config.autoCloseRecipeBook.t: Close the recipe book when the panel opens. Re-opening the book is respected — everything scales to fit instead.
enderpocket.config.animationSpeed.toolti: Higher = snappier animations. 1.0 is the default feel.
